summary: Iteration 42 — Quote Request modal pre-qualification gating + new trip_type/service_duration fields. Backend: 5/5 pytest passed (POST with new fields, backward-compat without them, 422 enforcement on full_name/phone/vehicle_type). 1 skipped admin-list test due to 2FA. Frontend: full happy-path verified end-to-end via Playwright — modal opens from request-quote-Stretch-Limousine, submit DISABLED initially with 'Fill required fields to send' text, stays disabled after only name+phone, tooltip renders correctly via Radix on qr-info-name (text: 'So our chauffeur knows who they're picking up.'), Trip Type + Service Duration shadcn Selects open and accept selections (qr-trip-wedding, qr-duration-5-6-hours), all 9 required fields fill correctly, submit ENABLES with text 'Send request', click submits successfully and dialog transitions to success state showing 'Got it — we'll text you shortly' + 'Thanks, Jane'. Admin dashboard badge rendering verified via code review (QuoteRequestsTab.jsx lines 237-242: gold trip_type chip + cyan service_duration chip with ⏱ emoji); could not log into admin UI due to email 2FA requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteRequestDialog.jsx isValid useMemo correctly enforces all required fields and reasonable sanity (phone digits>=7, name>=2 chars, passengers>0). Good UX.
Backend QuoteRequestCreate keeps trip_type & service_duration optional for backward compat with legacy mobile clients — correct decision since UI enforces required at the form level.
Frontend mirrors trip_type into legacy `occasion` field for back-compat with old SMS/email templates — clean migration approach.
Tooltip uses TooltipProvider per-instance (one per InfoHint) — works fine but a single root TooltipProvider would be slightly more efficient. Minor, not blocking.

Date/time inputs use native HTML5 type=date/time (browser default pickers) rather than shadcn Calendar — acceptable for quick lead capture, but if design consistency matters, swap to shadcn DatePicker.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required-field gating + tooltip + happy-path POST verified)

test_credentials: support@turanelitelimo.com / TuronAdmin@2025 (admin UI requires emailed 2FA OTP — could not complete in headless test)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_iter42_* quote-request rows in DB via the public POST endpoint. They are tagged 'TEST_iter42' in notes for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuoteRequestDialog pre-qual gating works end-to-end. New fields trip_type & service_duration persist correctly. Admin UI badge display was code-reviewed only — if next agent has admin 2FA OTP available, do a final visual check on the Quote Requests tab to confirm the gold/cyan badges render for the TEST_iter42 rows. Test data tagged with notes containing 'TEST_iter42'.
